Our Story

Rooted in Faith,
Serving Mbale


Founded in 2014 by dedicated Muslims from Nakaloke, Mbale and the wider Bugisu sub-region, Shabban Charity Organisation was established with one clear purpose: to translate the Quranic obligation of charity into tangible, lasting change for the most vulnerable in our community.

Over the years, we have grown from a small grassroots effort distributing Ramadan food parcels, into a fully registered charity managing multiple programs spanning education, water, healthcare, and emergency relief — all from our base in Nakaloke, Mbale, Uganda.

Every project we undertake is guided by the Sunnah of the Prophet ﷺ and grounded in the principle of Ikhlas — sincerity of intention. We believe that lasting change begins with the hearts of those who give and those who serve.

📖

Qur'an & Sunnah

Every decision guided by Islamic principles

🔍

"The example of those who spend their wealth in the way of Allah is like a seed that grows seven spikes; in each spike is a hundred grains. And Allah multiplies for whom He wills."
— Surah Al-Baqarah, 2:261
Impact Areas

Our Projects & Programmes

Eight focused programmes addressing the deepest needs of Mbale's most vulnerable communities — funded entirely by your Zakat, Sadaqah, and Waqf.

📿

Orphan Sponsorship

Provide monthly stipends, school fees, food, and emotional support to orphaned children across Mbale district, ensuring no child is left behind.

1,240+
Orphans Supported
Sponsor One →
🎓

Education Support

Scholarships, school fees, books, and uniforms for bright but underprivileged children in both Islamic madrasas and government schools.

850+
Students Enrolled
Support →
🌊

Water & Sanitation

Drilling boreholes and installing safe water systems in villages across Mbale and Sironko districts — a Sadaqah Jariyah that benefits thousands.

38
Boreholes Drilled
Fund Borehole →
☪

Mosque Development

Construction of new mosques and renovation of existing ones in rural communities — building houses of Allah across Eastern Uganda.

12
Mosques Built
Contribute →
❤️

Widow & Family Support

Monthly support packages, vocational training, and business startup grants for widows and vulnerable mothers raising families alone.

320+
Widows Supported
Help Now →
🍽️

Ramadan & Eid Relief

Distributing Ramadan food hampers, Iftar meals, and Eid gifts to ensure every family in Mbale can celebrate with dignity and joy.

2,800+
🐑

Qurban / Kurban

Sacrifice an animal this Eid Al-Adha and feed hundreds of families in Nakaloke, Mbale. Share the joy of Eid with those who have nothing — a blessed Sunnah, fulfilled through us.

Quranic Inspiration

The Foundation of Our Work

Every act of charity we carry out is inspired by the timeless words of Allah ﷻ in the Noble Qur'an.

وَأَقِيمُوا الصَّلَاةَ وَآتُوا الزَّكَاةَ وَأَقْرِضُوا اللَّهَ قَرْضًا حَسَنًا
"And establish prayer and give Zakah and loan Allah a goodly loan. And whatever good you put forward for yourselves — you will find it with Allah."
— Surah Al-Muzzammil, 73:20
لَن تَنَالُوا الْبِرَّ حَتَّىٰ تُنفِقُوا مِمَّا تُحِبُّونَ
"Never will you attain the good reward until you spend in the way of Allah from that which you love. And whatever you spend — indeed, Allah is Knowing of it."
— Surah Aal Imran, 3:92
إِنَّمَا الصَّدَقَاتُ لِلْفُقَرَاءِ وَالْمَسَاكِينِ وَالْعَامِلِينَ عَلَيْهَا
"Zakah expenditures are only for the poor and for the needy and for those employed to collect it and for bringing hearts together and for freeing captives..."
— Surah At-Tawbah, 9:60
وَفِي أَمْوَالِهِمْ حَقٌّ لِّلسَّائِلِ وَالْمَحْرُومِ
"And in their wealth, there was a right acknowledged for those who asked and for those who were deprived."
— Surah Adh-Dhariyat, 51:19

Full Accountability

Where Your Money Goes

We maintain the highest standards of Islamic financial ethics (Amanah). Every shilling is tracked, audited, and reported — because your trust is sacred.

2024 Fund Allocation

🧒 Orphan & Child Support 34%
📚 Education 22%
💧 Water & Sanitation 16%
🕌 Mosque Construction 12%
🍽️ Food Relief (Ramadan/Eid) 9%
🏥 Healthcare 5%
⚙️ Admin & Operations 2%

Our admin costs are minimized through Waqf income so that 98% of designated donations reach beneficiaries directly.

Reports & Documents

📋

Annual Report 2024

Full financial statements, project outcomes, and donor acknowledgement. Audited by PKF Uganda.

💰

Zakat Distribution Report Q1 2026

Detailed breakdown of Zakat collected and disbursed to the 8 eligible categories.

💧

Water Project Impact Report 2024

Locations of all 38 boreholes, GPS coordinates, and community beneficiary data.

🧒

Orphan Program Report 2024

Anonymized case studies and aggregate data on 1,240+ children in the programme.

🏛️

NGO Registration & Governance

Certificate of registration, board constitution, and Shariah advisory documentation.

Real Stories

What People Are Saying

From orphans who grew to become teachers, to donors across the globe — their words speak to the barakah of your giving.

★★★★★
"When my husband passed, I had four children and no income. Shabban Charity gave me a monthly stipend, enrolled my children in school, and trained me in tailoring. Today I run my own small business. Alhamdulillah — I am now the one giving back."
F
Fatuma Wanjiku
Widow Beneficiary · Mbale City
★★★★★
"I am a donor from the UK. What drew me to Shabban Charity was their transparency — I receive photos of the borehole I funded, GPS coordinates, and a signed community letter. My Sadaqah Jariyah is real, traceable, and life-changing."
M
Mohammed Al-Rashid
International Donor · London, UK
★★★★★
"I was orphaned at age 7. Shabban Charity paid my school fees from P4 through A-level. I am now a qualified nurse at Mbale Regional Referral Hospital. I owe my career — and my life — to the donors who never knew my name."
A
Aisha Namutosi
Former Orphan Beneficiary · Nurse, Mbale
★★★★★
"Our village walked 4km every day for water. After Shabban Charity drilled the borehole in 2022, not only do we have clean water — waterborne disease cases dropped by 80% in our area. This is truly Sadaqah Jariyah."
H
Hawa Nabirye
Village Elder · Bumasifwa, Mbale
★★★★★
"I give Zakat through Shabban Charity every year. Their Zakat distribution follows proper Islamic rulings, verified by a Shariah committee. I have peace of mind that my Zakat is accepted in sha' Allah and going to genuine recipients."
Y
Yusuf Kirunda
Business Owner & Donor · Kampala
Our People

Leadership & Board

Proud Mbale Muslims leading with experience, integrity, and deep love for the community they serve.

Sheikh Namajjee Shaba
Founder & CEO
The founding visionary of Shabban Charity Organisation, Sheikh Namajjee Shaba has dedicated his life to serving the Muslim community of Nakaloke, Mbale, and Eastern Uganda through Islamic charity, education, and relief work since 2014.
SU
Sheikh Siraji Bin Ubaida
Assistant
Sheikh Siraji Bin Ubaida serves as the key assistant to the CEO, supporting day-to-day operations, programme delivery, and community outreach with dedication and Islamic values.

Latest Updates

News & Activities

Stay connected with what's happening on the ground in Mbale — stories of impact, upcoming events, and programme news.

Water Project
Borehole Completed in Kireka — Hundreds of Families Now Have Clean Water
After months of fundraising and drilling, our latest borehole is now serving the entire Kireka community. Residents previously had to travel long distances daily for clean water before this project was completed. Alhamdulillah.
📅 March 15, 2026
Education
120 Orphans Receive S1 School Placement for 2026 Academic Year
Thanks to our Education Fund, 120 orphaned children started secondary school this January — the largest single intake in Shabban Charity history.
📅 Feb 3, 2026
Ramadan 2026
Ramadan Campaign: Target 3,000 Families — We Need Your Help
This Ramadan we aim to feed 3,000 families. With your Zakat and Sadaqah, we can reach every corner of Mbale District in sha' Allah.
📅 Jan 20, 2026
🕌
Mosque Project
🚧 Entebbe Road Nakaloke Masjid — Currently Under Construction
We are pleased to announce that construction is currently underway on the Entebbe Road Nakaloke Masjid. This community masjid is still in progress — your generous donations are helping build it. Support us to complete this Sadaqah Jariyah in sha' Allah.
📅 Ongoing — 2026
